title: Super Mario Prostate Exam Gameplay
description:
smpe.mechaware.net GO HERE TO PLAY THE DEMO

Yeah, I make games too. You guys are right; 
I SHOULD be famous. This is a test level. In other news, I broke my arm and won't be posting any videos for at least 6 weeks. Bummer, huh? 

In other other news, I'm also part of another game being made, Hotel Mario 2.
